goal: 好 你来增强一下 dogfood 本身的设计和功能先

summary.title: 增强 dogfood workflow 表达
summary.what: 扩展 cxs dogfood JSONL golden 与 runner，让单个 dogfood case 能描述真实检索 workflow：多 query attempts、排序、cwd/selector scope 和排除 self-hit session；runner 为每个 attempt 保存 find/context artifact，并在报告中标出最终采用的 attempt。
summary.why: 刚才真实使用 cxs 时，失败不只是召回质量问题，还包含 agent 操作路径问题：当前会话 self-hit、SKILLS.md 与 SKILL.md/skills 路径近似、selector/sort/exclude-session 需要组合执行。原 dogfood schema 只能表达最终期望 session，不能复现这种 workflow，因此难以指导后续 cxs 产品改进。
summary.user_goal: 好 你来增强一下 dogfood 本身的设计和功能先

decisions.chose: Add optional find workflow fields to local dogfood JSONL: queries, limit, sort, selector, cwd, root, and excludeSessionUuids.
decisions.rationale: This lets a golden capture the actual retrieval workflow an agent had to use, not just the final expected session UUID.
rejected: Store workflow hints only in free-form origin notes
Require every case to stay a single query

decisions.chose: Run each configured query attempt, save its artifacts, and select the first attempt whose assertions pass.
decisions.rationale: Real history lookups often start from the user wording and then narrow to evidence-backed query variants; preserving each attempt makes the eval useful for product design.
rejected: Only run the original user query
Hide failed attempts after a passing attempt

decisions.chose: Render selected_attempt and attempt pass/fail details in README/scorecard outputs.
decisions.rationale: Future agents need to see which workflow path passed without manually re-reading raw JSON artifacts.

decisions.chose: Commit only generic runner/schema/docs changes and keep private goldens plus eval outputs under ignored data/.
decisions.rationale: Dogfood samples are local history artifacts and must not be shipped in public skills or repo history.
rejected: Move dogfood capture into skill-packages/cxs or skill-packages/cxsd

rejected.alternative: Implement official cxs recent/--cwd/--exclude-current CLI behavior in this same change
rejected.reason: The user asked to enhance dogfood first; this change makes the workflow measurable before choosing the public CLI surface.

rejected.alternative: Commit the private golden update that made the new recent-project-skills case pass
rejected.reason: The local golden contains private session IDs and stays in ignored data/ per dogfood boundary.

risks: Dogfood runner 的多 attempt 通过表示当前可复现路径有效，不等同于正式 cxs CLI 已具备更短的一条命令。
本地 dogfood 仍依赖本机 cxs 索引新鲜度；hard/candidate 判定需要结合 coverage 状态解读。
当前仍有一个 publish/what7 candidate fail，非阻断；它代表另一个待修 retrieval 场景。

anti_patterns.what: Commit private dogfood goldens or eval outputs while improving the runner
anti_patterns.why: Those artifacts can contain local session history and are meant to remain ignored developer-local evidence.

anti_patterns.what: Treat a passing multi-attempt dogfood case as proof that public cxs CLI UX is already good enough
anti_patterns.why: The pass may encode extra agent orchestration that should later become a simpler CLI feature.

followups: 基于 cxs-recent-project-skills-md-fuzzy-self-hit 设计正式 CLI 改进，例如 --cwd 简写、--exclude-current、recent 子命令或文件名 fuzzy normalization。
增强 dogfood schema 以覆盖 expected failure reason 或 CLI command surface 断言。
处理剩余 cxs-exact-command-publish-what7-not-cxs candidate fail。

acknowledged_constraints.note: runner continues to execute src/cli.ts through CLI_ENTRY; no repository-root cli.ts assumption was introduced.
only generic eval/schema/docs were committed; private goldens and eval outputs remain under ignored data/ and outside skill-packages.

review_notes: This is a backfill seal for commit 466d4d2 after abandoning earlier low-quality seal int_92c2a63e.
Verification after rebase: npm run check, npm run eval:dogfood, git diff --check.

architectural_claims: Dogfood JSONL can describe retrieval workflow in addition to final expected session assertions.
Dogfood runner remains a local acceptance gate over ignored private goldens; the repository commits only reusable runner/schema code.
behavioral_changes: eval:dogfood runs multiple find attempts when a golden sets find.queries.
find.cwd/root is converted into a cwd selector and find.selector can be passed directly.
find.sort and find.excludeSessionUuids are forwarded to cxs find.
Each attempt produces separate find/context artifacts; README and scorecard identify the selected passing attempt.

api_changes.signature: find?: { queries?, limit?, sort?, selector?, cwd?, root?, excludeSessionUuids? }

security_implications: Private dogfood samples and eval artifacts remain ignored under data/ and are not committed.
migration_notes: Existing dogfood cases without find keep the previous single-query behavior.
No SQLite schema or index migration required.
